title: TerraBlender
description: A library mod for adding biomes in a simple and compatible manner!
body:
<center>

![TerraBlender Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ae53639931e9029d151cfc66c8df925dae6d23e.png)

[![Support on Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3188789dee004c4d427bfc08d77eb25b525b9fb7.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Adubbz) [![Donate via PayPal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ed53aa073b5ae94a3933f71ffc54c8a788a4675.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?business=AdubbzG@gmail.com&cy_code=USD) [![Follow on X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/432006270d284b8772e556dc6e5acc874933f311.png)](https://twitter.com/TheAdubbz) [![Join our Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/792b68796689b351a2c469ef07c6c709e11197f8.png)](https://discord.gg/GyyzU6T)

</center>

TerraBlender is a library mod for adding biomes in a simple and compatible manner with Minecraft's new biome/terrain system.

**TerraBlender is available for [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/), [NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/) and [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/).**
- **[View all Forge versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender/versions?l=forge)**
- **[View all NeoForge versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender/versions?l=neoforge)**
- **[View all Fabric versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender/versions?l=fabric)**

## Developers
Documentation for how to use TerraBlender's API can be found on the **[TerraBlender wiki](https://github.com/Glitchfiend/TerraBlender/wiki/Getting-started)**
